title: telis caerulea
intro: Telis caerulea, also known as blue heliotrope, is a flowering plant that belongs to the borage family and is native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing stress and anxiety, and its herbal preparations are often used to treat digestive issues and promote better sleep. Telis caerulea can be consumed as a tea, taken in capsule form, or used topically in the form of ointments or salves to harness its medicinal properties.
